booking.title: Book Appointment

documents.title: Health Documents

documents.deleteConfirm: Delete this document and its extracted health data? This cannot be undone.

healthCoach.title: AI Health Coach
healthCoach.placeholder: Ask about your health... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
